events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the GEC splice violates NEC 250.64(C), which requires the grounding electrode conductor to run as one continuous length unless joined with a listed irreversible compression connector or exothermic weld. Decision is **fail** (high risk) since an improperly spliced GEC compromises the ground-fault/lightning dissipation path and must be corrected before closeout.
